description: Phase C execution tasks for v1.0.9.2 release hardening — land WIP, verify CI, open PR

tasks.title: Version and documentation sync
tasks.description: Align all version strings to 1.0.9.2 (especially docs/README.md at 1.0.9.1). Confirm CHANGELOG, verification-matrix, api-documentation, and troubleshooting reflect page support and release scope. No plugin PHP changes unless grep finds stale version constants.
tasks.status_note: docs/README.md is the known gap; plugin header already 1.0.9.2

tasks.title: Land QA toolchain files
tasks.description: Commit untracked composer.json, composer.lock, phpcs.xml.dist, phpunit.xml.dist, tests/bootstrap.php, tests/integration/*.php, and .gitignore vendor/ entries. Run composer install locally to verify lockfile. Do not commit vendor/.

tasks.title: Land CI workflows and align release lint scope
tasks.description: Commit untracked .github/workflows/qa.yml and modified release.yml. Reconcile php-lint find maxdepth (qa=5 vs release=3 per OQ-005). Confirm qa.yml phpunit job (install-wp-tests.sh) is documented as authoritative over stale v1.0.9.2-plan-status.md PHPUnit claims.
tasks.status_note: OQ-004 resolved: qa.yml runs integration PHPUnit in CI

tasks.title: Land packaging, icons, and integration verification
tasks.description: Commit scripts/package-plugin.sh, assets/images/ (icons + SVG), and remaining modified plugin/docs WIP. Run package-plugin.sh locally; confirm ZIP icon paths. Push branch and verify all qa.yml jobs pass on PR.

tasks.title: PHPCS main-file follow-up (optional)
tasks.description: Remove rank-math-api-manager.php from phpcs.xml.dist exclude list; fix or baseline WPCS violations; confirm phpcs CI job green. Deferred — not required for v1.0.9.2 ship.
tasks.status_note: Deferred per OQ-002; operator may skip or schedule post-release

tasks.title: Release smoke and PR checklist
tasks.description: Walk docs/PR-CHECKLIST-v1.0.9.2.md; confirm verification-matrix automated table matches landed qa.yml. Open PR to main with summary mapping AC-001–AC-012. Operator-owned merge and GitHub release after approval.
